meta.title: Cute Flexi Maker — Parts Guide
meta.description: Visual parts guide for Cute Flexi Maker. Browse base animals, heads, eyes, ears, hats, body segments, legs, tails, accessories, symbols, details, horns and more.
meta.ogDescription: Visual parts guide for Cute Flexi Maker.
nav.brand.title: Cute Flexi Maker
nav.brand.subtitle: Parts Guide · v1.0
hero.title: Parts Guide
hero.lead: Browse every part available in Cute Flexi Maker. Start with a base animal, then customize heads, eyes, ears, legs, accessories and details to design your perfect flexi. Use the table of contents below to jump to any category.
toc.title: Table of Contents
section.base-animals.title: Base Animals
section.base-animals.intro: Start with one of the base animals. The dragon is the newest addition.
section.heads.title: Heads
section.heads.intro: Pick a head to set the personality of your flexi.
section.eyes.title: Eyes
section.eyes.intro: Add expression with one of eleven eye shapes.
section.ears.title: Ears
section.hats.title: Hats
section.body-segments.title: Body Segments
section.bottom-segments.title: Bottom Segments
section.flexi-legs.title: Flexi Legs (Wings)
section.flexi-tails.title: Flexi Tails
section.legs.title: Legs
section.legs.note.2: Legs of the same name may look different depending on the segment.
section.legs.note.3: Legs only available on head segment when using Snail Head.
section.tails.title: Tails
section.accessories.title: Accessories
section.symbols.title: Symbols
section.details.title: Details
section.details.intro: Tiny details bring character. Multiple details can be combined on the same flexi.
section.details.note.2: Multiple details can be chosen at the same time.
section.horns.title: Horns
section.horns.intro: Crown your flexi with horns, antennae or a unicorn spire.
section.horns.note.1: Select horns can be chosen at the same time.
section.changing-colors.title: Changing Colors
section.changing-colors.intro: Cute Flexi Maker lets you change the color of every element so your creation looks exactly the way you want.
steps.1: Skin color changes the base color for the entire flexi.
steps.2: To open the color menu, click the colored circle to the right of the category name.
steps.3: For elements with multiple components, click the drop-down arrow to view all sub-components for that element.
steps.4: Don't see the perfect color? Click the plus and select a custom color!
section.disable-parts.title: Disable Parts
section.disable-parts.intro: Select elements can be disabled to fine-tune the smallest details. When a component can be disabled, a toggle switch becomes available when that component is selected in the color-change menu.
cta.title: Want the printable version?
cta.lead: Grab the full PDF to keep the guide handy offline.
footer.brand: Cute Flexi Maker — Parts Guide · v1.0
